# sweb_dns_srv_record (Resource)

Manages a single SRV record of a zone on the account (editSrv on /domains/dns). The domain must already belong to the account. Like sweb_dns_record it is identified by content, not the API's shifting index, and every attribute forces replacement.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Manage an SRV record of a zone the account already owns. Like sweb_dns_record
# it is content-addressed, and every attribute forces replacement.
resource "sweb_dns_srv_record" "autodiscover" {
  domain   = "example.com"
  service  = "autodiscover"
  protocol = "tcp"
  target   = "autodiscover.example.com."
  port     = 443
  priority = 5
  weight   = 0
  ttl      = 86400
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) The zone (domain) the record belongs to.
- `port` (Number) Target port.
- `protocol` (String) Protocol: tcp or udp.
- `service` (String) Service name without the leading underscore (e.g. "sip", "autodiscover").
- `target` (String) Target host that provides the service.

### Optional

- `name` (String) Host label the service sits under. Empty or "@" for the zone apex.
- `priority` (Number) Priority (lower is preferred). Defaults to 0.
- `ttl` (Number) Record TTL in seconds. Assigned by the API when omitted.
- `weight` (Number) Relative weight among equal-priority targets. Defaults to 0.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource id ("<domain>/<service>/<protocol>/<name>/<target>/<port>").
